__description: Crisis management plans for SQL crisis_plans + crisis_actions tables (CrisisPlan, CrisisAction ORM). Generated by /api/crisis-plan endpoint. Seeded to give Crisis Center a pre-existing plan on fresh install.

crisis_plans.root_cause_summary: <string: 2–3 sentences describing the root cause of the crisis>
crisis_plans.crisis_snapshot: <string: JSON string of signal counts used to generate this plan>

actions.title: <string: short action title>
actions.draft_message: <string|null: pre-written message if category is apology/escalate>
